'''Kaeira''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived in the [[Lower City]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] during the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]] and the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith]] occupation of that [[Planet/Legends|world]]. She was a member of the [[Hidden Beks]] [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gang]] and a bodyguard of its leader, [[Gadon Thek]].

==Behind the scenes==
Kaeira is only encountered if the player takes the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] choice to join the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]] and murder Gadon, subsequently killing her too.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
